curation_notes: Re-curated with updated hint guidelines. Patch commit a63573b modifies only http/auth.go (+4 lines), adding user.Perm.Admin = false after d.settings.Defaults.Apply(user) in the signupHandler function. Location derived directly from the advisory description which explicitly names the affected file and function, confirmed by the single-file patch diff. L3 hints differentiated from L1/L2: L3 area narrows to the self-registration endpoint and default permission logic (~3-5 files), L3 description adds specific configuration conditions (signup = true, admin in default template). Vulnerability class auth-bypass confirmed — CWE-269/CWE-284 map correctly to authorization bypass.
